name: studio.get_theme
description: Read an Actium Studio site's theme (brand colors, typography, spacing tokens, active theme id). Read-only.
whenToUse: Pre-edit read before calling update_theme_tokens so the agent operates on the current palette, not a guess.
Brand audit: check whether a site's tokens match the operator's brand guidelines.
Derive the brand palette for content generation so hero images or callouts pick complementary colors.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to change theme tokens — this is read-only; use update_theme_tokens for writes.
Caller wants per-page styling overrides — those live on the page, not the theme.
Caller only needs the primary brand color — studio.get_site returns minimal brand metadata and avoids this call.
